name: ultracode
description: Portable ultracode: dynamic multi-agent workflow orchestration for Codex, Qoder, Claude Code, Gemini CLI and other coding agents

scripts.test: vitest run --no-file-parallelism test/unit/process-cleanup.integration.test.ts && vitest run --no-file-parallelism test/unit/bench-process.test.ts test/unit/bench-process-linux-recovery.test.ts test/unit/process-stop-recovery.test.ts test/unit/runner.integration.test.ts test/unit/retry-resume.integration.test.ts && vitest run --no-file-parallelism test/unit/bench-signal.integration.test.ts && vitest run --exclude test/unit/bench-process.test.ts --exclude test/unit/bench-process-linux-recovery.test.ts --exclude test/unit/bench-signal.integration.test.ts --exclude test/unit/process-cleanup.integration.test.ts --exclude test/unit/process-stop-recovery.test.ts --exclude test/unit/runner.integration.test.ts --exclude test/unit/retry-resume.integration.test.ts
scripts.version: node scripts/sync-version.mjs && git add src/version.ts package.json package-lock.json
